mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie (user_id, name, score, tags, status, finish_time, comment, cover, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{score}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{finishTime}, #{comment}, #{cover}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE movie SET name = #{name}, score = #{score}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, comment = #{comment}, cover = #{cover}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
